wikitext.*:
=====[[Pokémon World Tournament]]=====
Cress uses three of these Pokémon in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle|Double]] and [[Rotation Battle]]s, and all six in [[Triple Battle]]s. He will always lead with his signature Pokémon, {{p|Simipour}}.

======[[Unova Leaders Tournament]]======
